g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is stored in the CSI feedback buffer, and how many past snapshots are kept?')
sendPrompt('How does the deep learning channel predictor work, and what architectures are used?')
sendPrompt('How does the MU-MIMO precoder use the predicted channel Ĥ(t+1) to compute beamforming weights W?')
sendPrompt('How does STA 1 compress and feed back CSI in Wi-Fi?')
sendPrompt('How does STA 2 compress and feed back CSI in Wi-Fi?')
sendPrompt('How many STAs can be served simultaneously with DL MU-MIMO?')
